description: Source registry for BDR ranking research collection. Search adapters produce normalized candidates; manual/static sources are review targets and future watcher seeds.

sources.label: Naver Cafe public search
sources.notes: Public Naver Cafe search result candidates. Requires human review before ranking use.

sources.label: Naver Blog search
sources.notes: Blog result candidates for tournament reports, recaps, and team mentions.

urls.label: KBA main
urls.notes: Official KBA site; domestic competitions, 3x3, records, notices.

urls.label: KBA division system
urls.notes: Division/i-League integrated system; league, tournament, records, schedule menus.

sources.label: Daum Cafe / BDR community

urls.label: BDR Daum Cafe search target
urls.notes: Seed for BDR/dongari basketball room URL discovery. Add exact board URLs after confirmation.

sources.notes: Daum Cafe does not have the same simple open search API path as Naver. Use manual URL seeds first, then add a dedicated adapter only for confirmed public pages.

sources.label: Google/web search candidate
sources.notes: Placeholder for a future web-search provider. Compare Brave Search, Bing Web Search, SerpAPI, Tavily, or Google alternatives before enabling.

sources.label: Manual URL intake
sources.notes: Use this for pasted URLs from Daum Cafe, Instagram posts, YouTube videos, images, or association pages.
